title: CFPB Amends Wise Order for Remittance Practices

title: Chase launches digital bank in Germany
text: JPMorgan Chase has launched its retail digital bank in Germany, introducing a fee-free savings account.

title: Euro stablecoin joint venture Qivalis adds 25 new banks
text: Qivalis, the joint venture company formed by European banks to launch a Euro stablecoin, has amassed the support of a further 25 banks, bringing the total number of institutions backing the project to 37.

title: Santander’s Getnet highlights ‘invisible’ payments as strategic growth driver
text: Santander-owned Getnet outlined five trends reshaping the global payments landscape, arguing that transactions are rapidly evolving beyond utility to become a core lever of customer experience and business performance.

title: Mastercard fires shots at fake online storefronts
text: Mastercard has launched Merchant Trust Services, built to help banks and payment providers identify and stop scams generated by fake online storefronts.

title: Primer raises $100 million to bring AI to every payment
text: Founded by former leaders at Braintree and PayPal, London-based fintech Primer has closed on a $100 million Series C funding round, with the aim of applying AI to every payment processed by a merchant.

title: Deutsche Bank applies AI to third party vendor risks
text: Deutsche Bank is using artifical intelligence to speed up the tedious, time-consuming, process of reviewing third party vendor risks.

title: TSB reports spike in impersonation scams
text: TSB is warning of a surge in impersonation scams as cases in the first quarter of this year have surpassed those recorded for full-year 2025, with the value of losses 116 percent higher.
